myDetails.description: Title of the page where a PREreviewer can see and edit their profile details.

welcomeToPrereview.message: Welcome to PREreview! You can use this page to help authors, editors, and other PREreviewers learn more about your interests, work, and review activity.
welcomeToPrereview.description: Message shown to a PREreviewer when they first visit their profile page.

onlyYouCanSee.message: Only you can see this page. You have two profile pages that everyone can see:
onlyYouCanSee.description: Text shown to explain the visibility of their profile pages.

viewPublicProfile.description: Link text to view the PREreviewer’s public profile page.

viewPseudonymProfile.description: Link text to view the PREreviewer’s pseudonym profile page.

name.description: Label for the name of the PREreviewer.

pseudonym.description: Label for the PREreviewer’s PREreview pseudonym.

orcidRecord.description: Label for the connection to the PREreviewer’s ORCID record.

connected.description: Label for if the PREreviewer has connected their ORCID record.

connectOrcidRecord.description: Link text to connect the PREreviewer’s ORCID record.

disconnectOrcidRecord.description: Link text to disconnect the PREreviewer’s ORCID record.

avatar.description: Label for the avatar of the PREreviewer.

uploadAvatar.description: Link text to upload an avatar for the PREreviewer.

changeAvatar.description: Link text to change the avatar of the PREreviewer.

removeAvatar.description: Link text to remove the avatar of the PREreviewer.

slackCommunityName.description: Label for showing the name the user is using on the Community Slack.

connectSlack.description: Link text to connect the PREreviewer’s Slack account.

disconnectSlack.description: Link text to disconnect the PREreviewer’s Slack account.

emailAddress.description: Label for the email address of the PREreviewer.

enterEmailAddress.description: Link text to enter the email address of the PREreviewer.

unverified.description: Label indicating that the PREreviewer’s email address is unverified.

changeEmailAddress.description: Link text to change the email address of the PREreviewer.

requestedReviewNotifications.description: Label for if the user wants to receive notifications when they request a review.

requestedReviewNotificationsOff.description: Label for if the user has turned off notifications when they request a review.

requestedReviewNotificationsOn.description: Label for if the user has turned on notifications when they request a review.

changeRequestedReviewNotifications.description: Link text to change the user’s preference for receiving notifications when they request a review.

openReviewRequests.description: Label for if the user is open to receiving review requests.

enterPreferenceReviewRequests.description: Link text to enter the user’s preference for receiving review requests.

changePreferenceReviewRequests.description: Link text to change the user’s preference for receiving review requests.

setPreferenceReviewRequestsVisibility.description: Link text to set the visibility of the user’s preference for receiving review requests.

yes.description: Label for if the user agrees to something.

no.description: Label for if the user does not agree to something.

shownPublic.description: Label for if the user’s information is shown on their public profile.

restricted.description: Label for if the user’s information is only visible to PREreview.

careerStage.description: Label for the career stage of the PREreviewer.

enterCareerStage.description: Link text to enter the user’s career stage.

changeCareerStage.description: Link text to change the user’s career stage.

setCareerStageVisibility.description: Link text to set the visibility of the user’s career stage.

early.description: Option for the “Enter career stage” question.

mid.description: Option for the “Enter career stage” question.

late.description: Option for the “Enter career stage” question.

researchInterests.description: Label for the research interests of the PREreviewer.

enterResearchInterests.description: Link text to where the user will type in their research interests.

changeResearchInterests.description: Link text to change the user’s research interests.

setResearchInterestsVisibility.description: Link text to set the visibility of the user’s research interests.

location.description: Label for the location of the PREreviewer.

enterLocation.description: Link text to where the user will type in their location.

changeLocation.description: Link text to change the user’s location.

setLocationVisibility.description: Link text to set the visibility of the user’s location.

languages.description: Label for the languages spoken by the PREreviewer.

enterLanguages.description: Link text to where the user will type in their languages.

changeLanguages.description: Link text to change the user’s languages.

setLanguagesVisibility.description: Link text to set the visibility of the user’s languages.

uploadAnAvatar.description: Title of the page where a PREreviewer can upload an avatar to use on their profile.

selectImageError.description: Error message shown when the user tries to complete the “Upload an avatar” form without selecting an image.

imageTypeError.message: The selected file must be a AVIF, HEIC, JPG, PNG or WebP
imageTypeError.description: Error message shown when the user selects a file of an unsupported type for the “Upload an avatar” form.

imageSizeError.message: The selected file must be smaller than {size}
imageSizeError.description: Error message shown when the user selects a file that is too large for the “Upload an avatar” form.

youCanUploadAvatar.message: You can upload a photo or image to use as your avatar. The selected file must be smaller than {size}.
youCanUploadAvatar.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Upload an avatar”.

whereWillItShow.description: Heading for the section that explains where the avatar will be shown.

showOnPublicProfile.message: We’ll show your avatar on your public profile.
showOnPublicProfile.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Where will it show?”

removeYourAvatar.description: Title of the page where a PREreviewer can remove their avatar from their profile.

removeAvatarFromProfile.message: We’ll remove your avatar from your profile.
removeAvatarFromProfile.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Remove your avatar”.

canUploadNewOne.message: You will be able to upload a new one at any time.
canUploadNewOne.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Remove your avatar”.

removeAvatarButton.description: Button to remove the avatar from the PREreviewer’s profile.

whatCareerStage.message: What career stage are you at?
whatCareerStage.description: Heading for the page that asks the PREreviewer what career stage they are at.

selectCareerStageError.message: Select which career stage you are at
selectCareerStageError.description: Error message shown when the user tries to complete the form “What career stage are you at?” without selecting an option.

preferNotToSay.description: Option for the “What career stage are you at?” question.

seeCareerStage.message: Who can see your career stage?
seeCareerStage.description: Heading for the page that asks the PREreviewer who can see their career stage.

showOnPublic.message: We’ll show it on your public profile.

showThemOnPublic.message: We’ll show them on your public profile.

saySoOnPublic.message: We’ll say so on your public profile.

noOneElseKnow.message: We won’t let anyone else know.

willNotShare.message: We won’t share it with anyone else.

willNotShareThem.message: We won’t share them with anyone else.

whatEmailAddress.description: Heading for the page that asks the PREreviewer what their email address is.

enterEmailAddressError.description: Error message shown when the user tries to complete the form “What is your email address?” without entering a value.

enterEmailAddressFormatError.message: Enter an email address in the correct format, like name@example.com
enterEmailAddressFormatError.description: Error message shown when the user completes the form “What is your email address?” with an invalid email address.

usedToContactYouAboutYourAccountAndPrere.message: We’ll only use this to contact you about your account and PREreviews.
usedToContactYouAboutYourAccountAndPrere.description: Text shown alongside the heading “What is your email address?”

receiveRequestedReviewNotifications.message: Would you like to be notified when a requested PREreview is published?
receiveRequestedReviewNotifications.description: Label for the form if the user wants to receive notifications when a review they requested is published.

selectReceiveRequestedReviewNotification.message: Select yes if you would like to be notified
selectReceiveRequestedReviewNotification.description: Error message shown when the user tries to complete the form “Would you like to be notified when a requested PREreview is published?” without selecting a value.

whatLanguages.message: What languages can you review in?
whatLanguages.description: Heading for the page that asks the PREreviewer what languages they can review in.

seeLanguages.description: Heading for the page that asks the PREreviewer who can see the languages they can review in.

whereBased.description: Heading for the page that asks the PREreviewer where they are based.

seeLocation.description: Heading for the page that asks the PREreviewer who can see where they are based.

happyTakeRequests.message: Are you happy to take requests for a PREreview?
happyTakeRequests.description: Heading for the page that asks the PREreviewer if they are happy to take requests for a PREreview.

selectHappyTakeRequestsError.message: Select yes if you are happy to take requests for a PREreview
selectHappyTakeRequestsError.description: Error message shown when the user tries to complete the form “Are you happy to take requests for a PREreview?” without selecting an option.

seeHappyTakeRequests.message: Who can see if you are open for review requests?
seeHappyTakeRequests.description: Heading for the page that asks the PREreviewer who can see if they are open for review requests.

whatResearchInterests.description: Heading for the page that asks the PREreviewer what their research interests are.

seeWhatResearchInterests.message: Who can see your research interests?
seeWhatResearchInterests.description: Heading for the page that asks the PREreviewer who can see their research interests.
